title: cneorum tricoccon
intro: Cneorum tricoccon, also known as the white rockrose or oscar's rockrose, is a flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of cneorum tricoccon include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
